assertions.expectation: Starts with pre-flight checks: current versions, cluster health, node status
assertions.reason: Response includes comprehensive pre-flight checks with kubectl version, kubectl get nodes, node pool details, pods health check, and application health verification

assertions.expectation: Includes the gcloud command to check available versions in the release channel
assertions.reason: Includes 'gcloud container get-server-config --zone=$ZONE' to check available versions

assertions.expectation: Includes the API deprecation check command before upgrading
assertions.reason: Includes 'kubectl deprecations --k8s-version=v1.32.0' command to check for deprecated APIs

assertions.expectation: Provides the exact gcloud command for control plane upgrade to 1.31 first (--master flag)
assertions.reason: The user prompt states cluster is already at 1.32 and needs to get to 1.32, but the response shows upgrading from 1.31 to 1.32 directly, not upgrading to 1.31 first

assertions.expectation: Includes a verification step after control plane upgrade with expected output
assertions.reason: Includes verification commands like 'kubectl version --short', 'kubectl get nodes', and cluster status checks after control plane upgrade

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for node pool upgrades — may use skip-level (N+2) for node pools to reduce steps
assertions.reason: Provides exact gcloud commands for upgrading both default-pool and workload-pool, though no skip-level upgrade is demonstrated

assertions.expectation: Includes monitoring commands to watch node pool upgrade progress
assertions.reason: Includes 'watch "kubectl get nodes -o wide"' and kubectl wait commands to monitor upgrade progress

assertions.expectation: Provides sequential control plane upgrades (1.30→1.31→1.32) with option for skip-level node pool upgrades
assertions.reason: Only shows single upgrade step from 1.31 to 1.32, does not provide sequential upgrades from 1.30→1.31→1.32

assertions.expectation: Includes post-upgrade validation: node versions, pod health, kube-system pods
assertions.reason: Comprehensive post-upgrade validation including node versions, pod health checks, kube-system pods, and application testing

assertions.expectation: Provides a rollback section explaining what to do if something goes wrong
assertions.reason: Includes rollback section explaining that GKE doesn't support downgrading and provides alternative approaches for recovery
